SELECT substringIndex(url, '.', 1) AS first_part FROM test_substringIndex;
SELECT substringIndex(url, '.', 2) AS second_part FROM test_substringIndex;
SELECT substringIndex(url, '.', -1) AS last_part FROM test_substringIndex;
SELECT substringIndex(url, '.', -2) AS second_last_part FROM test_substringIndex;
SELECT substringIndex(substringIndex(url, '.', 1), '.', 1) AS nested_substring FROM test_substringIndex;
SELECT url, substringIndex(url, '.', 2) AS domain_name FROM test_substringIndex WHERE url LIKE 'www.%';
SELECT DISTINCT substringIndex(url, '.', 1) AS first_level_domain FROM test_substringIndex WHERE length(substringIndex(url, '.', 1)) > 0;
CREATE TABLE domain_stats AS SELECT substringIndex(url, '.', 1) AS domain, count(*) AS occurrences FROM test_substringIndex GROUP BY domain;
SELECT s.first_part, d.occurrences FROM (SELECT substringIndex(url, '.', 1) AS first_part FROM test_substringIndex) AS s JOIN domain_stats AS d ON s.first_part = d.domain;
SELECT url, substringIndex(url, '.', -1) AS tld FROM test_substringIndex WHERE substringIndex(url, '.', -1) IN ('com', 'org');
SELECT CASE WHEN substringIndex(url, '.', 2) = 'clickhouse' THEN 'ClickHouse Domain' ELSE 'Other Domain' END AS domain_type FROM test_substringIndex;
